commentText: I know about them, but how do you integrate, can you give advice?
reply:
Brother, start stupid simple.

Track your energy for 7 days.
When do you feel sharp
When do you crash
When do you want to isolate
When do you feel most driven

Then build your day around that instead of fighting it.

Deep work when your mind is hottest.
Training when your body wants to move.
Low effort tasks when your system dips.
No heavy food or dopamine spam early if you want clean focus.

Most men lose because they copy routines that were never built for their nervous system.

Know thyself first, king. Then the blueprint writes itself.
